# LLMs / AI agent entrypoints for webtransport-bun

project: webtransport-bun
repo: https://github.com/vmeansdev/webtransport-bun
license: MIT

preferred-doc-order:
  1. README.md
  2. docs/SPEC.md
  3. docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
  4. docs/OPERATIONS.md
  5. docs/TESTPLAN.md
  6. docs/COMPATIBILITY.md

authoritative-docs:
  - README.md : product positioning, quickstart, examples
  - docs/SPEC.md : API contract and stability notes
  - docs/ARCHITECTURE.md : implementation constraints and invariants
  - docs/OPERATIONS.md : runtime defaults, tuning, runbooks
  - docs/TESTPLAN.md : required verification gates
  - docs/CI.md : CI and release flow

notes-for-agents:
  - Target runtime: Bun >= 1.3.9
  - Target OS: macOS + Linux (no Windows)
  - Respect bounded-memory and deterministic-shutdown constraints
  - Prefer examples under examples/ for runnable integration checks
